Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
226 
PART_D_LIS_25 
LABEL: 
Part D Low Income Subsidy 25% 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the Part D low-income subsidy (LIS) where the subsidy level is 
25%. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PART_D_LIS_25 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
The width of this value changed from 12 to 8 in 2009. 
The CCW constructs the Plan
